12.text: 20 gerahs is equivalent to one shekel (approximately 0.4 ounces or 11.4 grams).
That is, 60 shekels total; elsewhere, the common mina was 50 shekels. Sixty shekels weighed approximately 1.5 pounds or 683.8 grams.
